title: GIF Explosions!
description: Renders a GIF explosion upon entity death.
body:
# GIF Explosions!

![ded sheep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fd1f46d8fd33994746aff084cba9d3e1a201fad.png)

### The GIF Explosions Mod is a
- Simple
- _Lightweight_  
- ~~Memory safe~~  
- **Client Side**

Mod for Minecraft Forge 1.8.9 (May be updated to newer loaders and versions)

## What does it do?
- The GIF Explosions mod renders the iconic explosion GIF and sound at the position of any player or mob when they die.

## Does it work in _Multiplayer_?
- **_Yes_**, the mod runs entirely client-side and uses the client’s view of entity health and death.
- ### However, it does partially rely on standard vanilla packets sent from the server (like entity updates).

## GIF Explosions Mod + Server Anti-Cheats?

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- This mod is fully client-side and does not send any packets to the server. It won’t get you banned unless the mod itself is blacklisted.
  
**1.**  The mod’s functionality could break on certain servers if anti-cheat systems spoof both the health and death state of entities. This can delay or hide entity deaths from the client, which would prevent the effect from triggering.
The mod uses a lightweight algorithm that tracks entities locally with minimal reliance on server packet accuracy.

**2.** The mod has been tested on some popular servers and did in fact work.

</details>
